findings.description: System-installed dbt-fusion shadows venv dbt-core — error message doesn't indicate PATH conflict
findings.proposedRule: P25: Resolve CLI tools from venv (sys.executable parent), not PATH

findings.description: dbt --full-refresh doesn't handle stale Iceberg metadata — 3 iterative commits to get purge right
findings.proposedRule: P26: Purge Iceberg tables via catalog API before dbt seed/run

findings.description: AST-inspecting test broke when fixture gained a new try block — regex matched wrong block
findings.proposedRule: P27: Structure-inspecting tests must search by content landmarks, not ordinal position

findings.description: OAuth error responses may reflect credentials in body — logging response.text creates CWE-532
findings.proposedRule: P28: Never log auth/management API response bodies — status code only

findings.description: Hardcoded /tmp/polaris-create.txt is world-readable on shared CI runners
findings.proposedRule: P29: mktemp for CI temporary files with explicit cleanup

findings.source: False stuck diagnosis during verify (14+ min debugging)
findings.description: Background pipe buffering (tail/head) hides all output until EOF — wasted debugging time
findings.proposedRule: P30: No pipe buffering on background tasks — redirect to file
